chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-305 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 07.11.2025 Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G ***** Learned Assistant Prosecutor General, under the instruction of Prosecution General Sindh, does not wish to press this application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
